name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc (Lahana Resort Phu Quoc & Spa)
address: 91/3 Trần Hưng Đạo, Dương Đ ng, Dương Đông, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam
description:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc - Nơi nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng tại Đảo Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc, một khách sạn 4.0 sao nằm tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian đẹp mắt. Với khoảng cách chỉ 1km từ trung tâm thành phố, khách sạn này cung cấp một sự thuận tiện tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của Đảo Phú Quốc.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc đã được xây dựng vào năm 2017, đảm bảo rằng cơ sở vật chất và tiện nghi của khách sạn vẫn mới mẻ và hiện đại. Với thời gian di chuyển chỉ 20 phút đến sân bay, khách sạn này cung cấp sự tiện lợi cho du khách đến và rời khỏi Đảo Phú Quốc một cách dễ dàng.

Khi đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc, bạn có thể nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và trả phòng trước 12:00 PM. Với tổng cộng 85 phòng, khách sạn này cung cấp đủ không gian cho du khách để lựa chọn. Đặc biệt, khách sạn cũng cho phép trẻ em từ 5 đến 5 tuổi ở miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ em.

Giải trí tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc không chỉ nổi tiếng với các dịch vụ spa và massage chất lượng, mà còn có nhiều tiện ích giải trí tuyệt vời khác. Khách sạn có một quầy bar thân thiện và phục vụ đa dạng các loại đồ uống ngon lành. Bạn có thể thư giãn và thưởng thức những ly cocktail tuyệt vời trong không gian thoáng đãng và ấm cúng của quầy bar. 

Ngoài ra, khu vực chăm sóc sắc đẹp và làm tóc của khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng rất đáng chú ý. Bạn có thể tận hưởng những liệu pháp làm đẹp chuyên nghiệp và thư giãn tại salon hiện đại của khu nghỉ dưỡng. Với đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp và các sản phẩm chất lượng, bạn sẽ cảm thấy thật thư thái và tự tin sau mỗi lần trải nghiệm. 

Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng không gian xanh mát và yên bình, khu vườn của khu nghỉ dưỡng là điểm đến lý tưởng. Bạn có thể dạo chơi trong khu vườn xinh đẹp, thư giãn trên những chiếc ghế thoải mái và ngắm nhìn cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp xung quanh. Ngoài ra, khu vực chung với TV và ghế sofa cũng là nơi lý tưởng để bạn thư giãn, xem phim và trò chuyện với bạn bè và gia đình. Đừng quên thử trải nghiệm tắm nắng tại khu vực solarium của khu nghỉ dưỡng, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng ánh nắng mặt trời và cảm nhận sự thoải mái tuyệt đối.

Tiện nghi thể thao tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng và phong phú. Khách sạn có hồ bơi trong nhà và hồ bơi ngoài trời, nơi du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian nước tuyệt đẹp. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn có quầy bar bên bể bơi, nơi du khách có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống mát lạnh trong không gian thoải mái.

Nếu bạn là một người yêu thích thể dục và thể thao, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc còn cung cấp trung tâm thể dục miễn phí hoạt động suốt 24 giờ. Bạn có thể tận hưởng không gian rộng rãi và trang thiết bị hiện đại để rèn luyện sức khỏe và thể lực. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng cung cấp các hoạt động thể thao ngoài trời như câu cá, lặn biển, đi thuyền, cầnô và công viên nước. Bạn cũng có thể tham gia hoạt động lặn biển và snorkeling để khám phá vẻ đẹp đáy biển tuyệt vời của Đảo Phú Quốc.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, và mang đến cho khách hàng một loạt các tiện nghi tiện lợi. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt ủi, dịch vụ phòng, hộp đựng đồ giá trị, lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong các khu vực công cộng và khu vực được chỉ định để hút thuốc. 

Ngoài ra, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc còn cung cấp Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, dịch vụ giặt khô, dịch vụ nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh, két đựng hành lý, và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày. Với các tiện nghi này, khách hàng có thể tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ tiện lợi và thoải mái tại khu nghỉ dưỡng này.

Tiện ích vận chuyển tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc hân hạnh cung cấp nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Đầu tiên, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong việc di chuyển đến khu nghỉ dưỡng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón đến các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng trong khu vực, giúp du khách khám phá đảo Phú Quốc một cách thuận tiện và dễ dàng.

Khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ đậu xe valet và bãi đậu xe tự phục vụ, giúp du khách yên tâm về vấn đề đỗ xe. Nếu du khách muốn tự lái, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ cho thuê xe, giúp du khách thoải mái khám phá đảo Phú Quốc theo ý muốn. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đặt vé và dịch vụ taxi, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển trong khu vực một cách thuận tiện và nhanh chóng. Bãi đậu xe miễn phí và bãi đậu xe tính phí cũng có sẵn tại khách sạn, đảm bảo du khách không gặp khó khăn trong việc tìm chỗ đỗ xe.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc không chỉ mang đến cho bạn một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời mà còn là một thiên đường ẩm thực đa dạng. Tại đây, bạn có thể tận hưởng không gian thư giãn và thưởng thức một tách cà phê thơm ngon tại quán cà phê. Quán cà phê của khu nghỉ dưỡng cung cấp một loạt các loại cà phê và đồ uống khác nhau, đảm bảo sẽ làm hài lòng cả những thực khách khó tính nhất. 

Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn có nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng từ các món truyền thống đến món ăn quốc tế. Bạn có thể thưởng thức những món ăn ngon miệng và được chế biến từ những nguyên liệu tươi ngon nhất. Nếu bạn muốn dùng bữa trong phòng, dịch vụ phòng của khu nghỉ dưỡng sẽ đáp ứng mọi yêu cầu của bạn. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn có cơ sở BBQ để bạn tự nướng thịt và tận hưởng những buổi tiệc ngoài trời thú vị. Để bắt đầu một ngày mới đầy năng lượng, bạn có thể thưởng thức bữa sáng buffet hoặc bữa sáng kiểu lục địa tại nhà hàng của khu nghỉ dưỡng. Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc cam kết mang đến cho bạn một trải nghiệm ẩm thực đáng nhớ.

Lựa chọn phòng tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, mang đến cho bạn những phòng nghỉ sang trọng và thoải mái. Các loại phòng bao gồm: 2-Bedroom Family Bungalow, 2-Bedroom Villa, Deluxe Bungalow Double, Deluxe Double Garden View, Deluxe Family Garden View, Deluxe Twin Garden View, Garden View Deluxe Triple Room, Hillside Bungalow with Bathtub và Standard Room. Với diện tích rộng rãi và nhiều lựa chọn giường, bạn sẽ tìm thấy phòng phù hợp với nhu cầu của mình tại đây.

Đặt phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc thông qua Agoda để tận hưởng những ưu đãi tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, tiện lợi. Agoda cam kết cung cấp giá tốt nhất cho bạn, giúp bạn tiết kiệm chi phí và thời gian. Đừng bỏ lỡ cơ hội trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc, đặt phòng ngay trên Agoda ngay hôm nay!

Dương Đông - Trung tâm sầm uất của Đảo Phú Quốc

Dương Đông, với vị trí trung tâm nằm ở phía Tây Nam của Đảo Phú Quốc, là một thành phố nhộn nhịp và sầm uất. Với vị trí đắc địa, Dương Đông là điểm đến lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá và trải nghiệm văn hóa địa phương. 

Đến Dương Đông, bạn sẽ được thưởng thức những món ăn đặc sản đậm đà hương vị biển như hàu nướng mỡ hành, cá trích nướng mắm, hay sò điệp nướng mỡ hành. Ngoài ra, khu chợ đêm Dương Đông cũng là nơi lý tưởng để trải nghiệm văn hóa địa phương, tìm hiểu và mua sắm các sản phẩm đặc sản. 

Ngoài việc khám phá ẩm thực độc đáo, Dương Đông cũng có nhiều điểm tham quan hấp dẫn như Dinh Cậu - một ngôi đền biển với kiến trúc độc đáo, Bãi Dài - bãi biển dài và tuyệt đẹp, hay Công viên Chợ Đêm - nơi tổ chức các hoạt động vui chơi giải trí vào buổi tối. Với sự phát triển nhanh chóng, Dương Đông cũng có nhiều cửa hàng, quán bar và nhà hàng sang trọng để bạn thưởng thức và thư giãn sau một ngày dạo chơi.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam là một điểm đến nổi tiếng với vẻ đẹp hoang sơ và bãi biển tuyệt đẹp. Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc nằm tại thị trấn Dương Đông, gần sân bay quốc tế Phú Quốc.

Cách tiếp cận Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc từ sân bay rất thuận tiện. Du khách có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe taxi hoặc xe đưa đón của khu nghỉ dưỡng. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay đến khu nghỉ dưỡng khoảng 10 phút, tùy thuộc vào lưu lượng giao thông.

Ngoài ra, du khách cũng có thể sử dụng xe đạp hoặc xe máy để di chuyển từ sân bay đến khu nghỉ dưỡng. Đảo Phú Quốc có một hệ thống đường rộng và dễ đi, cho phép du khách khám phá vùng đất này theo cách riêng của mình. Tuy nhiên, hãy nhớ đảm bảo an toàn và tuân thủ các quy tắc giao thông khi lái xe trên đảo.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian yên tĩnh và dịch vụ chất lượng. Với vị trí thuận lợi và các tiện ích hiện đại, khu nghỉ dưỡng này sẽ mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ trên Đảo Phú Quốc.

Khám phá những điểm tham quan gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc nằm gần một số điểm tham quan nổi tiếng tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam. Chỉ cách khách sạn một quãng đi bộ, du khách có thể đến Long Beach - bãi biển dài và tuyệt đẹp với cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh. Đây là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn, tắm nắng và tận hưởng không gian biển cả tuyệt vời.

Ngoài ra, cũng gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc có Dinh Cậu, một ngọn hải đăng nổi tiếng tại Đảo Phú Quốc. Du khách có thể leo lên đỉnh hải đăng để ngắm cảnh hoàng hôn tuyệt đẹp và thưởng thức không khí biển trong lành. Thánh thất Dương Đông và Bảo tàng Cội Nguồn cũng là những điểm đến gần khách sạn, nơi du khách có thể khám phá văn hóa và lịch sử độc đáo của đảo. Với vị trí thuận lợi, du khách cũng có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan khác như Chùa Sư Muôn, Chùa Sùng Hưng và Bưu Điện. Bệnh viện Phú Quốc cũng nằm gần khách sạn, mang lại sự an tâm cho du khách khi cần chăm sóc y tế. Với nhiều lựa chọn thú vị trong khu vực, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc là một điểm dừng chân lý tưởng để khám phá vẻ đẹp và văn hóa của Đảo Phú Quốc.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc có lợi thế vị trí với nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Đối với những ai thích hương vị Mỹ, Winston's Burgers & Beer là lựa chọn hoàn hảo. Ngoài ra, còn có các nhà hàng khác như OCSEN Beach Bar & Club, Ra Khoi Restaurant, The Home Pizza Tran Hung Dao, Sunset Beach Bar & Restaurant và Hanh Nhung Luxury để khám phá và thưởng thức. Với sự đa dạng và chất lượng của các nhà hàng này, du khách sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy nhàm chán trong việc khám phá ẩm thực tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc.

Trải nghiệm mua sắm tại các điểm đến nổi tiếng gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc nằm gần nhiều điểm đến mua sắm nổi tiếng. Bạn có thể khám phá vô vàn món đồ thủ công tuyệt đẹp tại Cửa hàng đồ mỹ nghệ Phú Quốc, từ những món trang sức ngọc trai độc đáo tại Ngọc trai Long Beach, cho đến những món đặc sản tại Chợ Dương Đông và Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. Hãy dành thời gian tham quan và mua sắm tại những điểm đến này để mang về những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ từ hòn đảo Phú Quốc.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc

Với giá phòng trung bình là $69, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc là một sự lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Đảo Phú Quốc. So với giá phòng trung bình của các khách sạn khác trên đảo, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc cung cấp một giá cả hợp lý, đảm bảo sự tiết kiệm cho du khách.

Với giá phòng trung bình là $75 tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc đang giữ mức giá thấp hơn so với trung bình. Tuy nhiên, không phải chỉ vì giá rẻ mà dịch vụ tại đây bị giảm chất lượng. Khách sạn này cung cấp các tiện nghi hiện đại, phòng ốc sang trọng và không gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Với giá phòng trung bình hợp lý, du khách có thể trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ và tiết kiệm tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc: Một nơi đáng khám phá

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng của mình. Khách sạn được đánh giá cao với dịch vụ thân thiện và nhiệt tình của nhân viên. Phòng rộng rãi, bữa sáng ngon miệng, cơ sở vật chất sạch sẽ và nhân viên thân thiện đã mang lại cho tôi và bạn bè một kỳ nghỉ thú vị. Tôi rất thích khu nghỉ dưỡng này và chắc chắn sẽ quay lại. Địa điểm tốt, hồ bơi tuyệt vời, phòng rộng lớn và bữa sáng ngon là những điểm đáng chú ý. Nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình đã tạo nên một dịch vụ tuyệt vời cho khách hàng.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc - Nơi nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với đánh giá cao từ khách hàng

Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thư giãn trên Đảo Phú Quốc. Với mức đánh giá tổng thể 9.1, khách hàng đã đánh giá cao sự hài lòng của mình với chất lượng dịch vụ và tiện nghi tại khu nghỉ dưỡng này.

Với mức đánh giá 9.1 cho giá trị, Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc mang đến cho khách hàng một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đáng giá với mức giá hợp lý. Khách hàng đã thấy rằng giá cả phù hợp với chất lượng dịch vụ và tiện nghi mà khu nghỉ dưỡng mang lại. Điều này giúp khách hàng cảm thấy hài lòng và tin tưởng khi lựa chọn khu nghỉ dưỡng này cho kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao tiện nghi tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng & Spa Lahana Phú Quốc với mức đánh giá 8.9. Khu nghỉ dưỡng này cung cấp các tiện nghi hiện đại và đầy đủ như hồ bơi, nhà hàng, quầy bar và spa. Khách hàng đã có thể tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn tuyệt vời tại hồ bơi, thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại nhà hàng và thư giãn với liệu pháp spa chất lượng. Điều này giúp khách hàng có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ và thỏa mãn tại khu nghỉ dưỡng này.

sample_comments.text: Cảm giác sạch sẽ và rất thoải mái. Nhân viên cũng thân thiện và phục vụ tận tình. Vị trí tiện lợi và dễ di chuyển, tôi cảm thấy an tâm khi lưu trú một mình. Phòng yên tĩnh và bình tĩnh, dễ dàng để nghỉ ngơi. Đây là một khách sạn mà tôi muốn quay lại sử dụng.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. YUKI,

Thank you very much for your wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that you had a comfortable and pleasant stay with us. It is especially rewarding to know that you appreciated the cleanliness, peaceful atmosphere, and our convenient location.

Your kind words about our staff's friendliness and attentive service truly mean a lot to our team. We are also glad that you felt safe and relaxed during your solo trip.

We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Sincerely,
Lahana Team
sample_comments.room_type: Bungalow bên sườn đồi có bồn tắm

sample_comments.title: Đáp ứng được mong muốn của tôi
sample_comments.positives: Vị trí trung tâm của resort, thiết kế phong cảnh trong khu resort, bể bơi
sample_comments.negatives: Nhân viên bộ phận tiếp đón chưa nhiệt tình lắm, đặc biệt khi khách check out.

sample_comments.text: Vì nơi này nổi tiếng với người Hàn Quốc nên tôi đã trực tiếp lưu trú. Như trong các đánh giá, nhân viên phục vụ rất tốt và cơ sở vật chất cũng rất tuyệt. Nước hồ bơi sạch sẽ và bữa sáng cũng gọn gàng. Máy lạnh cũng mát, nếu có cơ hội lần sau tôi muốn quay lại.
sample_comments.title: Lựa chọn tốt nhất
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. JEMIN, 

Thank you very much for your wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that you chose to stay with us and that your experience lived up to the positive reputation among Korean guests.

It is truly rewarding to know that you were satisfied with our friendly staff, excellent facilities, clean swimming pool, and well-prepared breakfast. We're also glad that the air conditioner kept your room comfortable during your stay.

We sincerely appreciate your kind words and look forward to welcoming you back again in the future.

Sincerely,
Lahana Team
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Loại Sang Giường Đôi Hướng Vườn

sample_comments.title: Một nơi ở mang đúng tính chất nghỉ ngơi thư giãn
sample_comments.positives: Một nơi ở vô cùng dễ chịu! Mọi thứ khiến gđ tôi vô cùng thư thái, phòng ngủ rộng rãi, tiện nghi. Các bạn nhân viên rất nhiệt tình, thái độ rất tốt. Đồ ăn sáng tuy không nhiều món nhưng mỗi món đều rất ngon, nóng sốt!
sample_comments.negatives: Mỗi tội hơi nhiều muỗi nhưng có thể hiểu do cảnh quan xung quanh nhiều cây cối.

sample_comments.text:
Cảnh nhìn rất đẹp và thích hợp cho chuyến du lịch gia đình~
Giường rất rộng~ Cảnh biển nhìn từ hồ bơi cũng rất tuyệt ^^ Khi đi đến hồ bơi hay nhà hàng mà khoảng cách xa thì có dịch vụ buggy rất tiện lợi ^^ Nhân viên cũng rất thân thiện~
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. SUNHWA, 

Thank you so much for your lovely review. We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed the beautiful views, spacious bed, and the pool with its ocean view.

It's also wonderful to know that you found our buggy service convenient and our team friendly and helpful. We're especially happy that you had a great family trip with us.

Your kind words truly mean a lot to us, and we hope to welcome you and your family back again for another memorable stay.

Sincerely,
Lahana Team
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Gia đình Deluxe Nhìn ra Khu vườn

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Một kì nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Lahana, mọi thứ đều tốt, nhân viên tại lễ tân hỗ trợ rất nhiệt tinh

sample_comments.text:
Nhân dịp kỷ niệm 12 năm ngày cưới, tôi đã đến thăm cùng gia đình. 
Ngay từ ngày đầu tiên cho đến khi trả phòng, nhân viên rất thân thiện và vào ngày kỷ niệm, họ đã trang trí phòng trước để tôi có thể tổ chức một sự kiện bất ngờ cho vợ. 
Tôi xin gửi lời cảm ơn sâu sắc đến Duyen vì đã giúp tạo ra những kỷ niệm ý nghĩa và vui vẻ. 
Mọi người hãy đến đây nhé, xung quanh có nhiều khu vực kinh doanh cũng rất tiện lợi.
sample_comments.title: Nơi ở vượt ngoài giá trị đồng tiền, là nơi có giá trị không thể tin được.
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Gia đình Deluxe Nhìn ra Khu vườn

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Phòng ốc sạch sẽ, nhân viên thân thiện, không gian sanh sạch đẹp đáng để nghỉ dưỡng.
sample_comments.negatives:
Bữa sáng không đa dạng lắm, nhà mình ở 4 đêm thì cả 4 bữa sáng gần như không thay đổi mấy, đầu bếp nấu không được ngon hợp khẩu vị nhà mình lắm.
Khách sạn hơi xa biển, nhà mình đi vào mùa mưa nên cũng không tắm biển được bữa nào.

sample_comments.text:
Đồ ăn ngon và thân thiện với môi trường. 
Có cả khu vực bơi nông và sâu. 
Nước được quản lý rất tốt. 
Thông thường khi đến hồ bơi, bạn có thể thấy dầu (mỹ phẩm), lá cây và côn trùng nhưng ở đây tôi chưa thấy lần nào. 
Nhân viên rất thân thiện và cũng có dịch vụ gọi taxi. 
Bữa sáng cũng rất ngon, tôi thấy có khu ăn sáng Hàn Quốc lần đầu tiên. Cả cách bày biện và hương vị đều rất tốt. 
Nhân viên rất thân thiện, không có bất kỳ sự bất tiện nào. 
Thủ tục nhận phòng và trả phòng nhanh chóng. 
Dọn phòng cũng diễn ra nhanh chóng và hiệu quả. 
Nhược điểm là ếch? Húng hắng kêu vào mỗi tối. 
Sàn nhà không hoàn toàn sạch sẽ. 
Có nhiều đồi núi nên sẽ được rèn luyện chân. 
Đường vào hơi nằm sâu bên trong. 
Nhưng tôi nghĩ không có resort nào với giá như vậy. 
Yên tĩnh và nhìn chung rất hài lòng với nhiều thứ.

sample_comments.title: Poorest resort we stayed at
sample_comments.text: Stayed here for 5 night but would not recommend it. To anyone. Especially people from other nations.The photos look nice but the resort lacks basic amenities, lot more expensive than other resorts in the area, too far from any activity. It's far away from beach , dirty ( room was clean though)and not worth. I felt staff mimicked us at several occasions in their own language. Have traveled to many countries and stayed at several luxury properties but this is first time we felt unvalued at this property. So people in Vietnam have been very respectful and kind throughout but this resort made us feel otherwise.While checkout they made us wait to conduct a final check to see if we stole something and when they didn't find anything they told me that laundry bag was missing. So ideally when we stay at hotels we sometimes use laundry bags to keep our wet or used clothes. We have been offered extra bags in fact by some resorts/hotels to use to carry our slippers or wet clothes.This time too we just used it to put our sand clad clothes. I am shocked to find out that they asked it back while checkout at reception and most importantly it felt humiliating. You think I am going to ditch my LV bag for your super luxurious laundry bag ? We spend millions on a vacation and being humiliated for a laundry bag is extra. Also they asked if we returned their umbrella that we had returned to them the night before only. Shame we booked this property which is not cheap at all but made us feel cheap. I want to convey to the reception staff that someone staying at the resort is capable enough to pay for such petty things and hence needs to be respected. Go ask the Yuju massage centre how much we spent every night for massage and go ask the tour operator at the end of the road what luxury we opted while touring Phu Quoc. Would not recommend it and not to people from other countries as I found them mocking people from other nations. I feel hurt and sad for myself.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms Pratima,
First and foremost, we would like to sincerely thank you for choosing Lahana Resort Phu Quoc and sharing experiences your stayed. We are truly sorry to hear that your journey with us did not fully meet your expectations. 
At Lahana Resort, we always take guest feedback seriously, and we are committed to continuously improving our service. With your kind understanding, we hope you can take a moment to read our response below. It comes from a place of deep respect and transparency.
1/ About the resort's environment and online information:
All the photos and descriptions of our property have been shared honestly and specifically on official websites and booking platforms. We strive to ensure our guests receive the most accurate and realistic impression of our space.
Unfortunately, during your visit, the weather was often rainy and overcast, which made the surroundings appear dull and messy. This was an objective condition beyond our control, and we regret that it negative

sample_comments.text: The resort itself and the pool are beautiful. The location is also good, it's walking distance from the busy town centre but quietly located to get a good night sleep. For me it stops with this, the rooms are plain and not nicely decorated. Our room was not very clean, we had cockroaches in the room and one day a really bad gasoline smell. The staff is not friendly at all, especially the guys working at the poolbar. During our stay of two nights they run out of pool towels twice and we had to wait for them for more then 40 minutes. No excuses, no offering of a normal towel (we've already been in the pool). We had to ask for them three times and the only thing they say was: 'Oh we run out, you have to wait'. Same with the cocktails, it took them forever and the staff was rude. In the morning people already claim their bed around the pool before they eat their breakfast what makes you feel like you are on a resort in Turkey or Spain.

sample_comments.title: DO NOT STAY HERE IF YOU WANT TO SLEEP
sample_comments.text:
This was probably our most disappointing stay in Vietnam. 
The pictures of this place are amazing, we were super excited about spending Christmas in a lovely relaxing oasis. 
The rooms are good, beds comfy, the property is really nice. 
However, the owners of the property also built a hostel as part of the resort. The hostel blasts music every single night. You cannot sleep unless you maybe are in one of the bungalows at the top of the property. Maybe.
We were moved, still heard it, then heard the other club that is by the property on the other side.
Loads of complaints, there is nothing they 'can' do. 
They gave us a refund of half of it, but still not worth it. Would have much rather been able to sleep at night. 
Its such a shame and terrible business practice to combine the two totally different types of accommodation together.
Could be really lovely, but with no sleep just find the whole place and time spent there completely miserable.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Jordan,

Thank you very much for leaving a review of your recent experience at Lahana Resort Phu Quoc.

Staff at Lahana are always willing to listen to guests and understand how we can improve the level of service that we provide to our customers. Your review is a gift that will help us to improve. 

We sincerely apologize for the negative experience you encountered during your stay due to the loud noises coming from 9 Station Hostel. During the time of your stay, many people were celebrating New Year's Eve together, which is why they had the loud music. We did inform the manager there about this issue at the time. We understand that effected your vacation at Lahana. We hope that we can have another opportunity in the future to improve and provide you with the enjoyable experience that you are expecting.

Thank you again for bringing this issue to our attention---please don't hesitate to contact with any further concerns.

Warmest regards,

Guest Relation
Hao Hao

This is what happened to us because i am afraid from insect. But receptionist Miss Tran Vo was very helpful upgraded us to high floor and better room with no insects coming in. Also they sent us a fruit platter as an apology 

Next to the hotel Zen spa is highly recommended so clean and their massage is excellent. 

Lots of restaurants are around. Small Supermarket, italian restaurant near is highly recommend.

We used the hotel laundry service which was not cheap and was returned pink underwear, singlets and socks that had left us white. The pool area is lovely but there were very few day beds in relation to the number of guests. Sadly I can not recommend this hotel and would most definitely not stay here again

sample_comments.title: Beautiful and relaxing
sample_comments.positives:
Beautiful property. Whoever designed it did a fantastic job. The landscape is so scenic and relaxing. We stayed in a family room with two queen beds. It was very comfortable. I loved polished concrete floors as as the first person to wake up there were no creaking sounds to wake anyone else up. For people without kids prob not all that exciting.

The buffet breakfast had lots of choice and we loved the relaxing atmosphere.

The swimming pool was good size and the view very nice. The staff members were beautiful all around and very welcoming - reception to the kitchen staff.
sample_comments.negatives:
Two of the swimming pool lights were coming off the wall completely and end up on the bottom of the pool while still connected via the cables. Electricity and water together is a scary concept. Especially as my daughter thought it was some rubbish and dived under to pick it up.

I don't fuss over small things but feel this is something they really should address.

sample_comments.text: 이용객 자체가 러시아 인들이 많은데, 여러나라 여행 경험 상, 대륙들은 아이들에 대한 제재가 없고 담배도 그냥 막 피워대며. 소음에 대한 기본이 안되어있습니다. 좀 침대를 크게 쓰고 싶어서 두 명 인 부모님도, 성인2,아이1있는 우리도 트리플룸을 예약했는데 방갈로는 단독이라 좀 낫겠지만 이 방의 타입은 대부분 입구쪽, 2층으로 이루어진 건물로 배정이 됩니다. 저희는 1층으로 배정받았는데 2층에서 의자 끄는 소리, 욕실 사용하는 소리, 욕실 문 닫는(이 문은 쾅 닫아야 닫힘) 소리로 잠을 거의 못 잤습니다. 그리고 푸꾸옥 전체적으로 직원들이 영어를 거의 못하고 서비스 수준이 좀 미달입니다. 다낭이 제일 서비스 면에서는 낫고 여기는 몇년 더 있어야 하지 않을까싶어요. 푸꾸옥 재방 삼방 계속 하는 사람들이 다낭과나트랑에 비해 적은 이유를 알겠습니다.

sample_comments.title: Comfort, peace and quiet.
sample_comments.positives: I was most impressed with the staff. They were friendly and went above and beyond whether I had problems or not. Breakfast was good, loved the big bed, ac/fan combo and most of all the peace and quiet.
sample_comments.negatives: I think the gym is a little under equipped, wifi outages occasionally, and a couple of us had a/c/fan issues. I know it wasn't just me, because I heard others talking about it during breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Just okey
sample_comments.text: Room just okey. But location bit far from center. And from reception go to room also far. Their buggy just help you when check in only. Not for check out. Very disappointed
sample_comments.response:
Dear Syara,

Thank you for choosing to stay at Lahana Resort in July 2024. We truly appreciate your feedback and the time you took to share your comments with us. We have taken note of your suggestions and would like to provide some clarifications:

- We are continuously updating all information about the resort on our website and other media channels to ensure it is clear and accurate.I trust this version will save you time and be easier to read
- Our resort is centrally located on the island, and by "center," we refer to the overall central area, not a specific street name.
- We offer 24/7 buggy car service within the resort and are always ready to assist our guests. We strive to accommodate all requests promptly, but during peak times, such as midday when multiple guests are checking out, there may be a slight delay. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused and appreciate your understanding.
We hope you had a memorable experience and wish you a wonderful trip on your

PROS

 Reception staff was welcoming and very helpful in every way!

Nice and clean rooms ( stayed in standard room ) 

Bed was ok, I've defenetly slept in way harder beds in Vietnam.

Breakfast had a lot of options
Minus the pre-made eggs/omelets 

There is plenty of restaurants and shops nearby in the area. 

CONS 

Although the pool is beautiful, the pool area felt cramped all day. Since everything on the hotel grounds seemed new, the sunbeds and matrasses should be replaced with new ones.

The hotel is located on the hill side of the main road witch could be limiting for some. ( they do drive you up to the pool/ restaurant with a buggy if you want to.

sample_comments.title: Lahana Resort
sample_comments.text: The location is about 1.5 km away from the Night Market (the happening spot). It cost only around 22000 dong to get there by taxi. It is convenient to get to Vinpearl Land and Sun world cable car as the free shuttle bus is just located at the main road 300m from hotel. You can request for the free shuttle bus schedule from the reception. The downside was u need to walk along a narrow road with pod holes, and rather scary to pass by a cemetery along the dark alley at night to reach the hotel. The best plus point was the hotel breakfast. They provide wide varieties of food and taste so delicious. Menus changed for all 3 days when we were there. Please keep up the standard. Room was big and quite comfortable. Staff is friendly especially Hao Hao, she came forward to apologise when there is some misunderstanding that happened at the reception counter. Overall, we had great experience staying in Lahana resort.
sample_comments.response:

Wifi stability issues, with a special location of Phu Quoc island, sometimes the quality is not as good as in the mainland due to the cable under ocean problem, and unfortunately you were in the island at that time but of course it doesn't happen always.

sample_comments.title: Great staff and environment!
sample_comments.positives:
The staff was very welcoming and friendly. Tran was very attentive when we arrived and during our stay, she made sure we were enjoying our trip, giving us some recommendations to visit around the island, etc. We had an early checkout and Tran also arranged a breakfast box for us to bring to the airport...10 out of 10!!
The location was perfect for us, a short walk and you get to the main road, full of restaurants, coffee shops, etc. We hesitated between different room types, finally we chose the bungalow up the hill (this means you will be closer to the breakfast/pool area), but other type of rooms seem to be as fine as this one.
We loved the outdoor shower in the bungalow!! Nice touch!

The resort is not at the beach, which is very clear in the location and description and was totally fine for us since we were interested in other activities, but keep that in mind if you are looking for a beach vacation.
sample_comments.negatives: If I am being picky, I guess the coffee option in the room could be upgraded to some black coffee drip bags (vietnamese coffee for example instead of Nescafé)

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The location is great, loved how close to town it was while still feeling removed from noise. Resort is not on the beach but it is close by, and the pool is huge. My private cabin was amazing. Staff were so lovely. Breakfast buffet was great.
sample_comments.negatives: Getting laundry done was really expensive. Better to just do it elsewhere for cheaper.

sample_comments.title: Value For Money
sample_comments.text:
Overall, this is a very good experience to stay in Lahana Resort. The room is spacious, very nice-designed as per photo shown. The staff is very helpful and willing to assist you for everything. 

The breakfast provided is nice, even though not much choices. But i had tried different flavour of pho during my stay. And, the happy hour promotion is very worth for money! A virgin mojito comes along with the sunset!

However, I am quite disappointed upon my check out. Your staff told me that the towels are missing in my room. This is due to your house-keeper didn't replace me the towel when i asked to change towels. ( I'm not asking the daily housekeeping, i rang to the receptionist to change the towels. The housekeeper drop by to take all the towel i hand over but he didn't replace me the same amount of towels). Even though I am not asking to pay, but this totally ruins my day.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs/Mr Chia,

Thank you for your stayed at Lahana resort
We're appreciated for your comment and really happy when you had a great time for relaxing in our resort. Some problem as you mention on the feedback, we're giving thanks and seriously to looked and improved that much be better in order to bring all best of service to all of guest trust and choosing our resort to stay
Hope to welcome you back in next time with much interesting waiting for your exploring .Wish you all the best , great healthy and lucky

Kind Regard
Kim- Guest Relation Dept

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The settings, accommodation, breakfast, outdoor shower ( in the bungalow), and especially the staff.
sample_comments.negatives: The hilly climb but one can call the front desk for a golf cart ride uphill.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing and Good Environment
sample_comments.text: It's a good place to relax, surrounded by greenery , good for eyes. Top Floor with Swimming Pool and Buffet Area is the Best. Good Open Viewing to the Sea and due to high ground , it's Open View , a good place to take photo or sitting there to relax and feel the view. For Room wise , it's not so clean as the floor is made by marble , but still acceptable. Open concept for bathroom with bathtub and shower. Room attached with balcony , again the balcony with chair could sit and have your beer together, it's relaxing. Thanks Lahana
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Wong,

It is wonderful to hear from you and to know that you had enjoyed your stay with us.

It's of a great satisfaction to learn that you loved the setting, the facilities, the quality of food and beverages. All the staff work so hard to make sure everyone has the best time so we will make sure they get to see your review.

We hope to see you again and look forward to your next visit in Phu Quoc Island.

Best wishes,

Lahana Team

sample_comments.title: Excellent service, the staff made me feel always take care of. I can tell this place is very well managed. Clean and bea
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful, clean rooms, natural setting. Gorgeous pool surrounded by nature.
sample_comments.negatives: It's gorgeous, peaceful grounds . Close enough to the night market with a cheap taxi ride, far enough from the noise . Perfect balance for a peaceful night sleep.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful resort
sample_comments.text: Resort is located on a hill so it's quite far from the beach, but the resort looks great and their staff is supportive and friendly. However, its morning buffet is not so good like I read in the reviews. We did not have many choices, just a few dishes.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Loan,

Thank you for an amazing review. We strive to provide the best service possible to all our customers so we are super pleased that you had a fantastic experience with us. I will be sure to pass on your amazing review to our staff . Thank you again for choosing us and providing constructive comment that make us improved our services. We look forward to welcoming back in the near future.

Best wishes,

Lahana Team

sample_comments.title: I've stayed here as it was recommended by my fried, will recommend to other friends too
sample_comments.positives: The resort is spacious, we could check in earlier as we arrived too early in the morning. The staff is friendly and helpful. Breakfasts are great
sample_comments.negatives: Everything was perfect

sample_comments.title: Average
sample_comments.text:
Received a welcome drink when arrive. Hotel was clean, nice pool and room clean with space. Buffet breakfast was nice with plenty to choose. Motorbike rental service is available at the hotel, but they request to keep your passport until you return motorbike.
Con was, Have to short walk through a small, dark and dirty alley to main street. Bedstead are annoying when you turning over when sleeping. We stayed 2night at Lahana and didn't have a nice sleep due to the bedstead are noisy!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Tan,

We would like to thank you for taking your time to leave us a review about your recent stay. It is very rewarding to hear you appreciated our spacious room and our infinity pool.

We sincerely apologize for the negative experience you encountered during your stay. We fully understand how frustrating it is to have leave your passport to rent a scooter. Unfortunately, that is the policy of the company that we are renting the scooter from. We did inform housekeeping manager about the noises of the bedstead to resolve it. We understand that effected your vacation at Lahana, we understand that this affected your stay and we would like extend our sincerest apologies.

We hope that we will have another opportunity in the future to improve and provide you with the injoyable experience that will like up to your expectations.

Thank you again for bringing this issue to our attention-please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any further concerns.

Sincerely,
Hao Hao (Ms)

sample_comments.title: We love the natural beauty and serenity of your resort
sample_comments.positives: Lahana Resort Phu Quoc and Spa thank you for a wonderful stay at your beautiful resort. My wife and I liked it so much we stayed an extra night. The natural beauty and serenity of your resort is restful and calming. The breakfast is varied, abundant and delicious. The pool is great too. We rented a moped for a couple of days to visit a few local beaches and towns. We hope to stay with you again. Sincerely, Chris and Quanh.

sample_comments.title: 4 star - for a reason
sample_comments.text:
Excellent garden and milieu. Pool area very nice though beach bed mattresses were... used.
Breakfast was versatile and plentiful. In restaurant staff trying hard but unexperienced. We were only two nights but seemed that price lewel in restaurant was quite high cause only few people ate their lunch there. Over all very relaxing and peaceful place.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Tuomo,

Thank you very much for leaving a review of your recent experience at Lahana Resort Phu Quoc.

All staff at Lahana understand that listen to guest to improve service is our responsibility for everyday and your review is truly a big gift for us.

We sincerely apologize for the negative experience you encountered with staffs at the Restaurant when you were here. I have spoken with the Restaurant leadership team to address the issue immediately. We do train our staffs to deliver the best possible service and are constantly striving to improve.

Thank you for taking your time to give us feedback, it is very important to us that you enjoy your stay at our resort. It was a pleasure hosting you and we hope to see you again. 

Warmest regards,

Guest Relation
Hao Hao

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: The resort was very pretty, with a beautiful Koi pond and lots of lush greeneries. The staff was super polite and friendly, and the breakfast buffets were quite nice! Definitely recommend staying here!

sample_comments.title: relaxing and good value
sample_comments.text: relaxing and good value

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Personal súper agradable y ayudando a todo momento. Desayuno buffet con gran variedad y rico.
sample_comments.negatives:
Más que resort para nosotros ha sido como un camping con un bungalow moderno y no de 4 estrellas. Nuestra habitación no tenía intimidad. El balcón con grandes ventanales estaba arran del suelo externo, por lo que toda persona que pasara andando nos veía. 
Teníamos que tener las cortinas cerradas.
Además, la parte del baño no tiene puerta, solo lo separa una mosquitera con el exterior. Cuando llovía entraba agua y si hiciera menos calor entraría frío. Nos despertaron dos días a las 8 de la mañana con fuertes ruidos cortando el césped y arreglando el jardín al lado de la ducha externa, hecho que no nos permitió descansar y no podíamos ni ducharnos ni ir al baño sin que nos viera el personal.
Por otro lado, al llegar al alojamiento, ponía que el check in era a las 14h, pero al llegar no teníamos la habitación preparada y tuvimos que esperar. 
Según nuestra opinión el precio y las instalaciones no son de calidad y a la altura de un resort.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Very nicely green resort, good location. I liked the room design, which is simple and close to nature.

sample_comments.title: Lugar bonito.
sample_comments.positives: El sitio es bonito
sample_comments.negatives: El restaurante es un poco caro y la calidad de los platos en comparaciòn con otros hoteles de Vietnam no es tan buena.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Room is clean and fresh but wireless network is not so good. Staffs are friendly. Resort has many trees so quite mosquitoes.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Duc

Thank you for taking the time to share your experiences regarding your recent stay at Lahana resort Phu Quoc. 

We are very sorry to hear that we did not meet your expectations while staying with us. We have taken special note on the concerns that you have mentioned, mosquito is an issue that all resorts and hotels are facing as we are in the island with surrounding forest, however we do minimize the mosquito in-house by do spaying with environmental- friendly method twice a month. Wifi stability issues, with a special location of Phu Quoc island, sometimes the quality is not as good as in the mainland due to the cable under ocean problem, and unfortunately you were in the island at that time but of course it doesn't happen always. 

Our goal is for each guest to leave completely satisfied. One again, we are sorry we did not meet this goal during your visit. We look forward to having the opportunity of welcoming you and your family back soon.

Sincerely,

sample_comments.title: Excelente! Cumplió con muestras expectativas
sample_comments.positives: El resort está bien cuidado, desayuno rico y variado, la piscina excelente
sample_comments.negatives: Lo único que le falta es estar en la playa

sample_comments.title: An experience with nature
sample_comments.text:
The room is spacious and clean, however because of its open concept, we had visiting mozzies, millipedes, spiders, huge lizards & beetls. The lemograss shampoo and body wash kind of helped to calm us from the bites tho. Anyhow, the check-out experience wasn't fantastic as they insisted that we had an open restaurant meal which we did not have. We had to wait some time for them to retrieve the restaurant bill to convince us that we were 'free loaders'. The bill came with no signature on it and the front desk lady gave us the most disgusted look and the supposedly hotel manager were trying to explain to our Vietnamese friend on the situation. In summary, we left without honouring this dubious restaurant open tab and left it to the hotel staff to settle their internal lapses among themselves.

Apart from this 2 incidents, Lahana is still recommended for a first time PQ visitor. :) Clean room, hearty breakfast and close to the night market.

sample_comments.title: Maravillosa
sample_comments.positives: El personal muy amable siempre dispuesto ayudar , la ubicación buenísima , la piscina y atención del restaurante al lado de la piscina muy bueno , puedes disfrutar en familia o en pareja .

sample_comments.title: Good breakfast
sample_comments.text:
Overall hotel environment is lovely.
Located in a small alley.
Plenty of massage places and eateries along the main street.
Breakfast is great - widespread of selection.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Cha, 

Warm greetings from Lahana Resort Phu Quoc.

Thank you very much for your wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our overall environment and peaceful location, as well as the convenience of nearby restaurants and massage services.

We are especially pleased that you appreciated our breakfast and its wide selection. Your kind words are truly encouraging for our team.

Thank you once again for sharing your experience. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Sincerely,

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Buen ambiente, tranquilo encantador, limpio, personal top

sample_comments.title: Review of a 3-night stay at Lahana
sample_comments.text: The entrance is a bit narrow, but that allowed for a quieter stay. There were issues with the vehicle during airport pickup and a misallocation of the room due to a system error, but the staff handled it well. The family room is on the second floor, making it very difficult to move luggage, but the view is good. The swimming pool is 1.4m deep and there is a kids' pool as well; the pool water was very clean. However, there is no shade, so it is easy to be exposed to sunlight. There are a few sunbeds, but it wasn't crowded. The cleaning status of the room was clean, but there were quite a few ants in the bathroom and on the terrace. When you walk from the hotel to the main road, it is quite lively with many restaurants, so the location is good.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Boram,

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed review following your 3-night stay with us.

We truly appreciate your honest feedback. We are pleased to know that you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere of our resort, the beautiful view from the Family Room, and our clean swimming pool. It is also wonderful to hear that you found our location convenient, with many restaurants and shops within walking distance from Lahana Resort.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced with the airport pick-up vehicle issue and the room allocation system error upon arrival. We truly appreciate your understanding and are glad that our team was able to assist you promptly.

Thank you as well for your comments regarding luggage access to the second floor, limited shade at the pool area, and the ants in the bathroom and terrace. Please rest assured that we have shared your feedback with the relevant departments to improve our service and maintenance.

Your

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Precioso hotel, picina grande , desayuno excelente. Personal muy buenos todos volvere sin duda y 100% recomendable

sample_comments.title: Decent stay
sample_comments.text:
Overall stay was quite good.

Rooms -
Deluxe Double Garden View room was quite spacious, clean and tidy, with nice garden view.

Washroom - Washroom was also fine and clean having seperate wet section. Drainage was working well. But toiletries containers were not and difficult to use. No bathtub.

Balcony - attached balcony with the room with garden view. Need to keep balcony door close as insects may come.

Food - Breakfast buffet is fine with enough options. Need to walk uphill or take hotel electric vehicle to go for breakfast location.

Service - Room service was fine and expected to take time as resort is big.

Swimming pool - Nice pool near breakfast area.

Parking - space available for car parking.

Ambience - Big resort with greenery all around in resort area.

Location - Location is 5-10min walking distance from main road. Just opposite side of man road have beach access which is good.

Not recommended for elderly people as need to walk uphill for rooms and reaching other areas.

They decorated our room and provided complementary fruits in occasion of our anniversary.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your recent stay with us. We are delighted to hear that you had an overall pleasant experience and that you enjoyed the spacious Deluxe Double Garden View room, the cleanliness, the garden view, and our swimming pool.

We appreciate your positive comments regarding the washroom facilities, drainage, breakfast buffet variety, and our room service. It is also good to know that our electric vehicle service was helpful for reaching the breakfast location.

At the same time, we sincerely thank you for highlighting areas where we can improve. Your feedback regarding the toiletries containers, the absence of a bathtub, and the need to keep the balcony door closed due to insects has been well noted. These insights are very valuable to us and will be shared with our management team for further consideration and improvement.

Once again, thank you for choosing Lahana. We truly appreciate your feedba

sample_comments.title: Es un resort excepcional pero tienes que saber que está alejado del centro
sample_comments.positives: Simplemente excepcional. Está todo lleno de jardines, muy bien cuidados. Están atentos. Se estropeó el aire acondicionado y esa misma noche ya estaba solucionado. El desayuno también increíble. Y las habitaciones tipo chalet o villa semi independiente son increíbles. El night market está a unos 20-25 minutos andando
sample_comments.negatives: La limpieza de las habitaciones podría mejorar en algunos detalles: cambio de vasos, polvo por encima de muebles etc.

sample_comments.title: Good and clean room
sample_comments.text: The staff all are friendly and helpful
sample_comments.response:

Providing a comfortable and welcoming environment is always our top priority, and it's wonderful to know we met your expectations.
Your satisfaction is our greatest reward, and we look forward to welcoming you back to Lahana again soon for another wonderful stay.

Sincerely yours,
Lahana team.

sample_comments.title: El mejor hotel de todo mi viaje a Vietnam
sample_comments.positives: Muy limpio y una atencion del personal muy buena. La verdad que el desayuno era increible. Soñe con seguir teniendo ese desayuno en los otros hoteles .

Y tanto la piscina como el cuidado del entorno le dan la guinda. La ubicación es buena, parece alejada pero en unos minutos caminando estas en la calle principal con los restaurantes.

sample_comments.title: Hotel.magnifico para relajarse
sample_comments.positives: Habitación en bungalow es excelente, la ducha en el exterior ..lo mejor..gran experiencia..un desayuno buffet grande con mucha variedad, toallas para piscina, paraguas..y la amabilidad del personal

sample_comments.title: 가성비는 좋아요
sample_comments.text: 룸컨디션도 괜찮고 금요일은 여성들만 칵테일을 줘서 먹엇어요. 썬셋도보며 사진찍기 좋아요. 직원들 너무 친절합니다. 삼일동안있었는데..조식이 같아서 조금씩 변화가 있었음하네요. 룸서비스로 햄버거 시켜먹었는데 맛있었어요.

Location from the airport is very convenient, big resort but the approach road is very dingy. Staff is courteous and helpful. Special mention to the reception staff who checked us in. Very friendly. (Sorry not able to recollect the name).

sample_comments.title: Bon hotel avec bon rapport qualité/prix
sample_comments.positives:
L'hotel est vraiment beau
La nourriture est très correcte, petit déjeuner très bien aussi.
Le personnel est top
sample_comments.negatives: Le lit en plus dans la chambre est payant alors que booking propose un tarif pour 2 adultes 2 enfants, pas viable dans la configuration de la chambre sans le lit.

sample_comments.title: Cozy and stylish
sample_comments.text:
We (2adults family)stayed for 3 nights before moving to a seaside resort hotel.
I wanted a twin room, so I ended up with a simple room that didn't get much sunlight.
I could have chosen a slightly better room if I could use a double bed, but that's the case with any hotel. It can't be helped.
There is a small infinity pool near the restaurant which was very relaxing.
However, there were times when families with small children splashed water and made noise, and I think that adult guests felt a little annoyed.
This is a cozy hotel, so it's okay to bring small children, but it would be better if there were some rules that wouldn't make a lot of noise.
Overall, it was calm, the room was well cleaned, the breakfast was delicious, and the staff was nice.
The downtown area is also nearby and it is convenient, and I would like to stay again if I have the opportunity.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mrs/Mr Kayoko,
Thank you so much for your review . It makes us very happy to hear you enjoyed your stay with us at Lahana Resort 
 We apologise for the issues you encountered and we are thankful for you bringing them to our attention . This help us improve our service and make your next stay with us even better 
Sincerely,
Lahana team

Your sincerely,

Lahana Resort Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: A lovely hotel with a few minor things to note
sample_comments.text:
the hotel is beautiful with a great pool area and very nice rooms (those tropical showers!).

A few buts: 
1) The food is average and a bit overpriced 
2) The "ocean view" rooms is not the ocean view you'd expect. Your view is to the path outside the bungalow as the ocean is quite far away, so don't bother paying more for this "special room". I actually think the mountain view room could provide more aesthetic satisfaction. 
3) Some of the reception staff could do with a bit of an English language learning. We didn't expect much and were generally fine, but some of them can't explain even simple things and can't understand a word - not good for front of house staff. 

Otherwise, all good. The beach that's close to the hotel is satisfactory, but don't expect much - Sao beach is much-much nicer. Though it's nice to have a mean in the evening there - a perfect spot with some really great fresh seafood options for super cheap prices.

sample_comments.title: Nice resort
sample_comments.text: Stayed here for 6 nights in a hillside bungalow. Received a lovely warm reception on check in. The electric buggy is really handy if you are at the top of the resort as we were. The bungalow was attached to another next door. The rooms are modern, large and well presented. It had a large sit out which we made use of. The bathroom has no glass in the windows but descent screens to keep the bugs out. It has a screen between the bedroom and bathroom so you can keep the bedroom cool but not the bathroom. Housekeeping was ok and friendly but perfunctory at times. You can hear next door a bit but not too intrusive. The pool is great and very popular with children so not the quietist of areas. The level of the music around the pool is quite loud but we liked the music type, not to everyone's taste I'm sure. The gym is open air so not really practical to use. The cocktails were tasty and reasonably priced at happy hour. Breakfast was extensive and tasty. The grounds were lovely and well maintained with a couple of koi ponds. Lots of restaurants in close walking distance. Would recommend the spa as well.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms/Mr Tony,
Thank you for your detailed review! We're so glad to hear you had a warm welcome and enjoyed your stay in the hillside bungalow. It's great to know you made good use of the electric buggy and appreciated the modern and spacious room. We're also happy that you enjoyed the pool, breakfast, and cocktails during happy hour! We take note of your comments on the bathroom screens, housekeeping, and gym, and will use them to improve our services. We appreciate your feedback on the music around the pool and the overall atmosphere. Thank you for recommending the spa and for your kind words about the grounds and nearby restaurants. We hope to welcome you again soon!
Sincerely yours,
Lahana team.

sample_comments.title: Phu Quoc Traveler Street, a cost-effective resort in the center.
sample_comments.text: A 10-minute taxi ride from Phu Quoc Airport, it's a well-located place whether you go to the central, northern, or southern areas of Phu Quoc. The staff is neither overly friendly nor unfriendly; they give off that kind of vibe. The breakfast room and reception do not have air conditioning and are open-air, with somewhat dim lighting. The pool in front of the breakfast room has a suitable depth and length, making it great for swimming and play. The menu at the restaurant that doubles as the breakfast room is substantial, and the prices are reasonable, making it comfortable to use. It's really nice to enjoy a beer while swimming. I booked the resort after reading reviews that there are no mosquitoes or bugs inside; in conclusion, there aren't many mosquitoes, but there are some, and while there aren't many bugs, there are a few. Just as the reviews stated, the resort is small but beautifully decorated, a great place for taking pictures. It has a Bali-like feel, and it seems like everyone is satisfied with the resort's landscaping, and I am too! Room cleaning is done daily, and the necessary items in the room are always replenished regularly. The quality of towels and amenities is not bad. The room is spacious and cool (they had the air conditioning on before check-in, which is thoughtful), and the balcony is also roomy, making it convenient to use. I visited during the rainy season in September, and the sound of the rain was very loud, slightly disrupting my sleep. (There's a small stream within the resort... my room was right in front of this stream, so I could hear the water flowing too loudly all night, making it hard to fall asleep... though some people might prefer the sound of this stream.) Upon check-out, they gave me a small gift, a bit of whole pepper. Overall, this resort offers great value for money, is clean, and is good, but one downside is that the narrow alley leading to the resort is a bit dirty, the road is broken, and maybe because it's the rainy season, there is always water overflowing, making it very difficult to walk around.

sample_comments.title: Formidable, je recommande +++
sample_comments.positives:
Nous avons adoré l'emplacement, l'hôtel en lui même, grande piscine, le lit très confortable, le balcon super, la chambre très grande, l'accueil chaleureux, souriant, la nourriture du restaurant excellente ainsi que le petit déjeuner très complet pour tout les goûts. 
Super salle de sport, avec bouteille d'eau et serviette à disposition, billard, grands espaces verts, très beau. 
À chaque ménage du jour, nous avons droit à 2 bouteilles d'eau gratuite. 
L'après midi à la piscine, cocktail offert !! 
Très au calme, nous avons toujours très bien dormis ! ( 5 nuits ) 
Nous avions réservé de base 3 nuits, mais vu la beauté de notre chambre etc, nous avons demandé à obtenir 2 nuits supplémentaires dans la même chambre et ils ont fait tout leur possible pour que cela se fasse et nous avons eu nos 5 nuits dans la même chambre ! 

Je recommande fortement cet hôtel, c'est un incontournable.
sample_comments.negatives:
Nous n'avons pas aimé la location du scooter car ils sont en mauvaises état, nous avons louer un premier scooter ou le réservoir était vide, donc nous avons mis le plein. Et le lendemain quand nous avons réservé à nouveau un autre scooter, encore une fois le réservoir était vide, de plus le monsieur de la sécurité qui s'occupe des scooter est vraiment très désagréable. Heureusement après s'être plaint ils nous ont mis un peu d'essence. 
Le pommeau de douche n'a pas de pression. 
Il fait très chaud dans le salle de bain et toilette (pas de Clim, seulement dans la chambre) 
Nous avions payer pour avoir des pétales de roses sur le lit, celles-ci ont taché le draps, et cela nous a été reproché par la réception (ce qui est bizarre puisqu'ils sont censé savoir que les roses peuvent tacher leur draps)

When checking out, I had to pay for laundry because cola had spilled on the bedding, so I hope other guests will be careful too.

Lahana Team

sample_comments.positives: Absolument tout était parfait. Le personnel au top, l'endroit magique je recommande 100 %. Grand merci a Vy &Duyen &Hoang &Khang réception
sample_comments.negatives: Absolument rien.

sample_comments.title: Good location.
sample_comments.text: This is a hotel with good value for money. The resort is small, so there aren't many facilities to use, but I made full use of the swimming pool. It's really nice even at night. You can use it until 9 PM. The pool depth is 1-4-1.5 meters, so children must wear life jackets. It's deep. I ordered takeout from Banh Xeo Cuoi 3 via Grab and ate it by the pool (I was informed that it's possible). The rooms feel a bit dated. You have to wear shoes inside, so I wore the flip-flops provided there (which Koreans don't like, haha). The resort's feedback is really quick. When I send an email, most of the time I get a response right away. However, the male staff who serves pho for breakfast is unfriendly. The rest of the staff were friendly. I was very satisfied with the laundry service in front of the accommodation for about 1,000 won. After leaving the accommodation, the restaurant next to Zenit Spa is neat and nice, and parents with kids should feed their kids chicken here! If you walk a little bit towards King Kong Mart, there's a currency exchange stand that also offers good rates. If you go a bit further up from there, you'll reach the Bin Bus stop. This resort is very well located. Next time I visit, I plan to stay in a bigger room and I want to try the massages in the resort alley as well.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms/Mr 가영, 
Thank you so much for your detailed and helpful review! 
We're glad to hear that you found our resort to be a great value and that you enjoyed using the swimming pool --- especially in the evening. We're also happy to know that the Grab food delivery experience worked well for you and that our front desk was responsive to your inquiries.
We appreciate your feedback regarding the room structure and the in-room slippers. We understand that certain room layouts may not suit everyone's preferences, and your comments help us to better accommodate future guests.
We're sorry to hear about the less-than-friendly service you received from one of our breakfast staff members. Please rest assured that we will look into this matter and continue to train our team to ensure consistently warm and welcoming service.
It's great to know you made good use of the nearby laundry service, restaurants, and currency exchange, and that our location worked well for your family --- especially for gues

sample_comments.title: Nice green place to relax in town
sample_comments.text:
I chose Lahana because its located near the airport i stayed 3 nights to recuperate from a long flight. Lahana was great for this purpose but I would not like to spend full holiday here simply because of hotels Town location. The town is busy over developed with dirty beaches an endless stretch of overpriced ugly hotels and construction sites.
When in Lahana resort you feel a million miles away it is very green and you almost feel like you are in the jungle. The resort is well maintained with beautiful gardens and ponds. 
I stayed in a hillside sea view bungalow room 315 which had a beautiful view from the balcony towards the sea partially over looking the pool. 
The hillside bungalows are spacious and comfortable very clean & have beautiful semi outdoor bathrooms . I would highly recommend.
The breakfast buffet has a good selection the restaurant overlooks the pool. The staff at Lahana were very pleasant and helpful .
Overall I would score the resort ten out of ten.

sample_comments.title: La Hana Resort & Awkward Phu Quoc Travel Review
sample_comments.text:
I initially booked 2 nights out of 5 and then extended my stay for an additional 3 nights. Moving around was a hassle, but the staff were friendly, the breakfast was decent, and the location was convenient, making it easy to explore the night market, King Kong Mart, the northern and southern parts evenly from one place.

Using Grab to get to the northern and southern areas cost about 15,000 won one way, and it seemed like King Kong Mart was around 1,200 won. (Since it's close to the accommodation, I think drivers tend to cancel, but it gets dispatched if you request multiple times. It's advisable to use Grab for nearby trips during the day, as it can get quite hot.)

Although it's in the city center, I liked the forest-like decor. There was a pool in front of the restaurant, so some people were enjoying the water while having breakfast. Breakfast is served from 6:30 AM to 10 AM, so if you like swimming, it's nice to enjoy breakfast leisurely before it gets too hot.

If you want to get a spa at the resort, it might be better to let the front desk know how long of a treatment you want when you make a reservation. They didn't ask, so I just booked the time and when I mentioned wanting a 120-minute treatment, the timing didn't match, and I ended up splitting it over two days. On the second day, I got a bit annoyed since they didn't keep the appointment time.

During my stay, I tried massages at the resort spa, Dong Zhang night market, street shops, and well-known shops, and the prices were so low that I felt guilty receiving the services. The resort massage was the most expensive, while the night market massage seemed to be the cheapest. If you tell the street shops that you want a service for a specific time, they seem to provide additional discounts off the prices listed in front. There's a Yuju spa about 5 minutes from the accommodation, and I received treatments there for the last two days. The prices felt like they were between the resort and regular massage shops, but they offered showers if the treatment was over 90 minutes and had pickup and drop-off services, which was nice. The owner seemed to be at the counter, but I never saw them take a break. My wife and I were wondering when they actually rest. By the way, my wife got her nails done here and said they did a meticulous job.

As of November 17, King Kong Mart was under expansion, and if you go further inside, you can find clothes, Crocs, bags, souvenirs, and more, so it's possible to go empty-handed and buy what you need on the first day. I bought a women's dress and a men's set for around 25,000 won. There was a store on the main road near the accommodation selling suitcases; a regular 28-inch suitcase costs about 30,000 won.

I explored Vin Safari early in the morning and then made my way to Vin Wonders, and by the time I finished checking out the water park, amusement attractions, and aquarium, it was around 4 PM. Neither the water park nor the amusement park had an extensive selection, but each had 2 to 3 impactful attractions. Some looked scary and fun, but I recommend against trying them if you have a weak heart.

I went without a plan and stayed for 5 nights and 6 days, and the time really flew by.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms/Mr SUNGCHUL,
Thank you so much for your detailed review! We're happy to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us and appreciated our friendly staff, breakfast, and the convenient location. It's great to know that our central position made it easy for you to explore both the north and south of the area, as well as local attractions like the night market and King Kong Mart.
We also appreciate your helpful tips about using Grab for transportation, especially in the heat during the day. We're glad that you liked the peaceful, forest-like atmosphere of the property, and we agree that the pool near the restaurant is a perfect spot for guests to relax and enjoy breakfast.
Thank you again for your thoughtful feedback. We hope to welcome you back for another enjoyable stay in the future!
Sincerely yours,
Lahana team.
